prompt.calc_ksp_solubility.question: Calcule la solubilidad molar de {substance_formula} dado Ksp = {ksp_value}. Respuesta en mol/L.

explain.calc_ksp_solubility.question:
Para la sal {substance_formula}:
Ksp = {ksp_value}, coeficientes: p = {coeff_cation}, q = {coeff_anion}.
s = (Ksp / (p^p · q^q))^(1/(p+q)) ≈ {correct_answer} mol/L.
